Industry Trends

Reverse Logistics Is Now a Trillion-Dollar Supply Chain. Most Companies Are Still Running It Like It's 2005.

The reverse logistics market hits $936B in 2026 and is on track for $1.75T by 2035. Most companies are still treating it like a back-office problem. That gap is expensive.
